Atomics.md.desc: Explains atomic operations for thread-safe programming, ensuring serialized and ordered execution in multi-core and hyper-threading environments.

OoO.md.desc: Discusses Out-of-Order execution as a CPU performance optimization technique to overcome frequency scaling limitations and improve instruction throughput.

HyperThreading.md.desc: Introduces hyper-threading as a CPU parallelism technique enabling multiple thread execution on a single core, maximizing resource utilization.

Registers.md.desc: Covers CPU registers as ultra-fast storage for state management, arithmetic, and logical operations, detailing x86-32 and x86-64 register sizes.

L-Cache.md.desc: Describes L-Cache (Level Cache) as a critical on-chip memory component reducing RAM access latency, enhancing CPU efficiency and performance.

MESI.md.desc: Details the MESI protocol for cache coherence in multi-threaded systems, preventing cache line incoherence across multiple CPU caches.

assemblers.md.desc: Explores assemblers as tools translating assembly language into machine code or object files, detailing popular options like GAS, MASM, NASM, and FASM for modern development workflows.

x86-64-isa-doc-gen.md.desc: AI-driven x86-64 ISA documentation, with human validation
